title: Youngever 4 Pack 3500ML Re-usable Large Clear Plastic Mixing and Serving Bowls, Popcorn Bowls, Salad Bowls, Chip and Dip Serving Bowls
features: Plastic Mixing and Serving Bowls BEST VALUE - Set of 4 3500ml Large Mixing and Serving Bowls

SAFE & STURDY - Made of Restaurant Quality Plastic, Dishwasher Top Rack Safe. Reusable, Break-Resistant and Durable material is a safer alternative to glass or disposable dining ware. NO BPA, NO LEAD.

GREAT FOR - Everyday meals, Cafe, Restaurant, Self-service area, Outdoor, Party, Kids, Home event, Patio, Games, Poolside, Picnic, Camping, RV, Beach and many more. Break-Resistant and Durable material is a safer alternative to glass or disposable dining ware.
SIZE - 3500ml capacity. 25 cm Diameter x 10 cm Height. Stackable and easy to store
